reviews.comment:
Primera vez... Pasamos y cenamos.. su gente más que amable ..y la comida muy buena... Vean los sandwiches y torta .. increíble!!!

(Translated by Google)
First time... We stopped by and had dinner... the people were incredibly friendly... and the food was delicious... Check out the sandwiches and cake... amazing!!!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6605327411822953876/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURYaUs2Vm1nRRAB

reviews.comment:
Esta posta de ACA es parada obligada camino a Ciudad de BA. Si no tenes que cargar combustible podes tomar un buen café y elegir entre una amplia variedad productos comestibles. Tiene sandwicheria y algo de patisserie en el serví compras!

(Translated by Google)
This ACA service station is a must-stop on the way to Buenos Aires. If you don't need to refuel, you can enjoy a good coffee and choose from a wide variety of food products. They have a sandwich shop and some pastries in the convenience store!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6605327411822953876/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNYNnRxWWhnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Buena atencion pero le falta más cariño en infraestructura en el shop, se quedo en el tiempo y los precios no son de lo mejor. La comida te salva si tenes hambre un 3.5/5.

(Translated by Google)
Good service, but the shop needs more attention. It's outdated, and the prices aren't the best. The food saves you if you're hungry, a 3.5/5.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6605327411822953876/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNYck9iRnVBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Ufff tremendo lugar y linda estación de servicio me encanto

(Translated by Google)
Wow, what an amazing place and a lovely gas station! I loved it.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6605327411822953876/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNYcU5qc0lREAE

reviews.comment:
Paramos a comprar algo para tomar y la verdad es un robo un agua ivess a 3 mil pesos me pareció un disparate!!! Primera y última vez que paramos! No m kiero imaginar lo que sale un agua Villavicencio!! Dios mío se aprovechan del turista!

(Translated by Google)
We stopped to buy something to drink and honestly, it was a rip-off! 3,000 pesos for Ivess water was outrageous! First and last time we stopped! I don't even want to imagine how much Villavicencio water costs! My God, they take advantage of tourists!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6605327411822953876/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURuMC1QMVhBEAE

reviews.comment:
Un bar muy recomendable sobre la Ruta 8 por la variedad y  calidad de sus comidas.  Muy buena atencion y baños siempre impecables

(Translated by Google)
A highly recommended bar on Route 8 for the variety and quality of its food. Excellent service and always spotless restrooms.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6605327411822953876/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNBOHMtNGRBEAE

reviews.comment:
Todo perfecto

(Translated by Google)
Everything perfect
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6605327411822953876/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNuanJLZmFREAE

reviews.comment:
Un parque muy grande, con juegos de plaza, pasto cortado, parrilleros y mesas pintadas. Las consultas las responden rápido.  Solo que hay solo un toma Corrientes.  Volveré!

(Translated by Google)
A very large park with playground equipment, mowed grass, barbecue grills, and painted tables. Questions are answered quickly. There's just one Corrientes outlet. I'll be back!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6605327411822953876/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNuc28yTFpREAE

reviews.comment:
Buena estación de servicio, antigua pero con bonito parque con mesas para descansar o hacer picnic, con juegos para niños. Baños limpios.

(Translated by Google)
Good service station, old but with a nice park with tables for relaxing or picnicking, and a playground for children. Clean restrooms.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6605327411822953876/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNkX2FhSkhnEAE

reviews.comment:
Hermoso paraje. Los chicos tienen buena atención. Los precios en el full son más altos que en cualquier otra estación homónima. Baños adecuados. Espacio para comer dentro y fuera. Parrillas.

(Translated by Google)
Beautiful location. The staff are friendly. Prices at the full-service restaurant are higher than at any other resort of the same name. Adequate restrooms. Dining space inside and outside. Grills.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6605327411822953876/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURIb1lIZDJBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Excelente servicio muy limpios los baños recomendable

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service, very clean restrooms, highly recommended
